title: August 13
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|August}}

'''August 13''' is the 225th day of the year (226th in leap years). There are 140 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1930s#1932|1932]] – [[John Berkey]] is born.
*[[1940s#1947|1947]] – [[John Stocker]] is born.
*[[1950s#1951|1951]] – [[Gene Day]] is born.
*[[1950s#1957|1957]] – [[Kathleen Gati]] is born.
*[[1977]] – [[Euan Morton]] is born.
*[[1985]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 101|''Star Wars'' (1977) 101]] published.
*[[1997]] – ''[[Boba Fett: Murder Most Foul]]'' published.
*1997 – ''[[Star Wars: The Special Edition Box Set]]'' published.
*[[2008]] – ''[[Star Wars: Dark Times Volume Two—Parallels]]'' published.
*2008 – ''[[The Betrayal of Darth Revan]]'' published.
*[[2010]] – ''[[The Old Republic, Blood of the Empire Act 3: Burn the Future]]'' starts publishing [http://www.swtor.com online].
*[[2014]] – ''[[Star Wars: Legacy Volume II Book 3—Wanted: Ania Solo]]'' published.
*2014 – [[Star Wars (2013) 20|''Star Wars'' (2013) 20]] published.
*[[2016]] – [[Kenny Baker]] dies.
*[[2021]] – "[[Kamino Lost]]" airs on [[Disney+]].
*[[2022]] – [[Wayne Grace]] dies.
*[[2024]] – ''[[The High Republic: The Edge of Balance, Vol. 3]]'' published.
*[[2025]] – [[Jedi Knights 6|''Jedi Knights'' 6]] published.
